This dataset is public-record only and curated for source quality over volume. See [INTENT.md](../../INTENT.md) for admission criteria and [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the edit flow.

## Type

- [ ] New record proposal
- [ ] Correction to an existing record
- [ ] Challenge to inclusion (move to review or remove)

## Record

- Existing record ID (if applicable):
- Matter name / parties:
- Jurisdiction:

## Public sources

Primary or stable secondary public source URLs. At least one is required for inclusion.

Which admission criterion does this satisfy? What is the AI-related conduct, output, or use, and what legal or regulatory action followed?

Anything else relevant to verification.
